chapter_title.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يَتَزَوَّجُ الْمَرْأَةَ وَ يَتَزَوَّجُ أُمَّ وَلَدِ أَبِيهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 35 – The man marries the woman, and he marries the mother of the child of her father

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/79)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/79)
text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الرَّجُلِ يَهَبُ لِزَوْجِ ابْنَتِهِ الْجَارِيَةَ وَ قَدْ وَطِئَهَا أَ يَطَؤُهَا زَوْجُ ابْنَتِهِ قَالَ لَا بَأْسَ بِهِ .

en.hubeali: Abu Ali Al Ashary, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Al Kufy, from Abu Abdullah Bin Jabala, from Is’haq Bin Ammar,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about the man who gifted the slave girl to the husband of his daughter (son-in-law), and he had copulated with her. Can his son-in-law copulate with her?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is no problem with it’.
en.sarwar: 3. Abu Ali al-Ash’ariy has narrated from al-Hassan ibn Ali al-Kufiy ibn Jabalah from Ishaq ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “I once asked abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a man who gives as a gift his slave- girl with whom he has gone to bed, to his son in-law; if his son in-law can go to bed with this slave- girl. He (the Imam) said, ‘It is not unlawful.’”
